title: BRIDGE - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY OFFICE BRIDGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance in navigating disability services, culturally specific advocacy, and referrals to outside organizations as needed. 6835 SW Clinton Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Ages 9-26 who are on the autism spectrum Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday by appointment only Email (971) 249-8064 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 249-8064 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Amharic, Arabic, Farsi, Maay Maay, Pashto, Somali, Swahili AREA SERVED: Washington County Services: Navigator Programs * Autism Spectrum Disorder Personal Health Care Advocate Services * Autism Spectrum Disorder Specialized Information and Referral * Autism Spectrum Disorder Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - UPLIFT MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - SHIFA HEALING CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WASHINGTON COUNTY OFFICE
